title: testfakes.Store implementing domain.Store (in-memory)
acceptance_criteria: FakeStore stores items in a sync.Mutex-protected map.
Put persists exactly the Item the caller supplied — version, updated_at, and all other fields. The store does NOT mutate Version or UpdatedAt; usecases own time and version intent.
Put with expectVersion >= 0 compares against the on-disk version and returns ErrVersionConflict on mismatch without writing.
Get returns ErrNotFound for unknown ids.
Self-tests cover every behavior so usecase tests can rely on the fake.
